title: A Structural Model of Automated Market Making
notes: Characterizes an optimal volatility-sensitive fee schedule.

title: A Myersonian Framework for Optimal Liquidity Provision in Automated Market Makers
notes: Interprets the jump in the demand curve as a bid-ask spread.
Separates adverse-selection and monopoly-pricing components of spread.

title: What's Fee Time Scheduler? - Meteora Documentation
notes: Uses linear or exponential fee decay.
Provides a concrete pattern for releasing elevated fees gradually instead of abruptly.

title: Meteora DAMM v2
notes: Documents support for both fee schedulers and volatility-based dynamic fees.
Useful as production-oriented evidence that these two control levers can coexist.

title: Common-sense statistical transforms
notes: Use convex risk transforms above threshold and concave relief transforms below threshold.
Aim to reduce broad cheap quoting while preserving selective competitiveness.
